string.name: main_menu_subtitle
string.value: NGF Runtime Framework Entry / HDS Root Navigation Container

string.name: card_hds_desc
string.value: Based on MainMenuPage's NavPathStack + navDestination architecture, integrating official HDS Navigation demos and single-page fusion examples.

string.name: card_hds_desc2
string.value: Legacy HDS component, layout, and animation pages have been removed and reorganized into a comprehensive demo page fully compliant with HDSNavigation visual patterns.

string.name: card_action_desc
string.value: High-frequency debug actions unified into glass-effect buttons for quick core path verification in the immersive home page.

string.name: action_bootstrap_desc
string.value: Re-confirm container, logger, event bus and basic capabilities are ready.

string.name: action_event_desc
string.value: Send a demo message to the core event bus, check the pipeline and log feedback.

string.name: action_lifecycle_desc
string.value: Simulate framework phased progression, observe status card and log changes.

string.name: action_error_desc
string.value: Verify error handler, error count and unified log collection.

string.name: action_official_desc
string.value: Verify unified main stack, official destinations and multi-function top bar page structure.

string.name: action_showcase_desc
string.value: Fuse components, layouts and animation verification capabilities in a single page.
